message:
feat(cli): add --verbose flag to resources and gc commands

Many functions silently return on errors, hiding problems during
resource collection and garbage collection. The new --verbose/-v flag
enables warning output for these silent failures without changing the
default quiet behavior.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
